story.heroTitle: Redefining Luxury for the Modern Era
story.heroDescription: GR Groups isn't just an e-commerce platform—it's a movement. We believe luxury should be accessible, authentic, and ahead of its time. Every product in our catalog is handpicked to meet the highest standards of quality and design.
story.missionDescription: To bridge the gap between high fashion and everyday style. We partner directly with designers and artisans worldwide to bring you pieces that tell a story—each item crafted with precision, purpose, and passion.

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.desc: GR Groups was born from a passion for luxury fashion, launching our first curated collection of streetwear and accessories.

timeline.title: Going Global
timeline.desc: We expanded to 20+ countries, partnering with exclusive artisan brands from Italy, Japan, and Scandinavia.

timeline.title: Tech Innovations
timeline.desc: Launched our AI-powered styling recommendations and augmented reality try-on features.

timeline.title: Community First
timeline.desc: Introduced our members-only Elite program, offering early access drops and personalized experiences.

timeline.title: Sustainability
timeline.desc: Committed to carbon-neutral shipping and partnered with eco-conscious brands worldwide.
